entries.title: Hex Utility and Optimization Pass
details: Inventory sorting was added with a smaller custom-shaped Sort button. It appears in player inventory, creative inventory, and many chest-style containers.
The sorter can merge compatible stacks while preserving NBT, rolled stats, socket data, and other custom item data.
Rarity overlays and held/equipped glints were optimized with a shared render cache to reduce repeated lore and NBT parsing.
Custom hair rendering received an FPS-focused cache and render-policy pass. Custom-form hair color support was also added as a configurable option.
The heavier custom-form overlay and renderer leak paths remain disabled by default for safety.
Black Coffin charging was tightened so locked users should no longer see the charge HUD or GUI when the skill is unavailable.
Socketing gained unsocket support. Players can remove a specific socketed gem or remove all socketed gems while preserving returned gem stats, effects, and NBT.
A dedicated Unsocketer GUI was added alongside the existing command and script API support.
entries.actionSubtitle: Use the new Sort button in inventory or chest screens. Shift-click support is included.

entries.title: <grad #FFD24A #FFF2A6 #FFB300 #FFD24A scroll=0.18 styles=l>Levelup Balance Update</grad>
details: Updated the levelup system for endgame rarity progression.
• Effervescent+ now supports the older Effervescent_ naming as the same rarity.
• Black can now be reached from Effervescent+, but the chance is intentionally extremely low.
• Black still has a pity fallback after many failed levelup attempts, so progress is never completely wasted.
• Random non-rarity items in the third levelup slot are now ignored instead of failing the levelup attempt.
• The third slot only contributes when it is a valid matching-type donor.
• Effervescent+ tier growth was adjusted: 2 levelup attempts count as 1 effective tier.
• Effervescent+ now gets small stat growth per levelup attempt, with a stronger bonus when a full tier step is completed.
• Other rarities keep their original levelup behavior.

entries.title: <grad #C38CFF #8DB7FF #C38CFF scroll=0.18 styles=l>Combine System Update</grad>
details: Adjusted combine behavior for <grad #FFFFFF #E8E8E8 #D0D0D0 #E8E8E8 #FFFFFF scroll=0.14>Pseudo Black</grad> and <grad #000000 #0A0A0A #141414 #0A0A0A #000000 scroll=0.14 styles=l>Black</grad> items.

• <grad #FFFFFF #E8E8E8 #D0D0D0 #E8E8E8 #FFFFFF scroll=0.14>Pseudo Black</grad> can now wildcard-combine with any rarity once, then continues using its normal combine cap with matching rarities only.•
<grad #000000 #0A0A0A #141414 #0A0A0A #000000 scroll=0.14 styles=l>Black</grad> can wildcard-combine with any rarity up to 2 times overall
then continues with <grad #000000 #0A0A0A #141414 #0A0A0A #000000 scroll=0.14 styles=l>Black</grad>-only combines while still respecting the normal cap.
• Combine now keeps the main rarity overlay properly instead of donor rarity lines leaking onto the result.
• Chaos tiers now keep only the highest rank present during combine instead of stacking multiple chaos lines.

• Accessory type lines are now deduped, and when accessory types differ the result keeps the best base type in this order: <grad #FFD7F7 #FFB6E8 #FFD7F7 scroll=0.16>Amulet</grad> > <grad #7FDBFF #A8ECFF #7FDBFF scroll=0.16>Ring</grad> > <grad #FFD24A #FFF2A6 #FFD24A scroll=0.16>Artifact</grad>.

entries.title: Hair / Black Coffin update/ Mod structure
entries.summary: Added more hair customization work and continued Black Coffin ability tuning, including GUI fixes, preview cleanup, and casting speed polish.
details: Continued work on the hair customization system, including GUI cleanup and picker fixes so color selection behaves more reliably without accidental extra button clicks.
More polish was added around hair preview behavior, split-color testing, and general customization flow for DBC-style hair editing.

Black Coffin received more tuning for its casting flow, with focus on making the build-up and coffin formation feel slightly faster and smoother without changing the overall feel of the move too drastically.
This update continues the ongoing push to improve both character customization and custom ability presentation as more edge cases are tested.

entries.title: Hex Renderer / Help update
entries.summary: Continued renderer and Hex Help tuning for outline behavior, nested style combos, and rabbit / easter styled text.
details: Continued cleanup and testing for the Hex text renderer, especially around outline behavior so outline styling does not get mixed up with nested gradients or outside wrapper colors.
Worked on combo support for newer style stacks including wave, rainbow, glitch, and rabbit / easter setups, along with continued testing for bold and nested style behavior.
Refreshed Hex Help examples and spring-style entries so newer wrappers and rabbit / easter examples are easier to test directly in chat.
More renderer polish and combo tuning is still ongoing as edge cases are found.

entries.title: Activity: Easter Event
entries.summary: Celebrate Easter with seasonal activities, festive fun, and limited-time rewards.
details: Join in on Easter-themed activities and enjoy special holiday fun during the event.
Look out for festive bonuses, seasonal rewards, and limited-time surprises.
More details will be available in-game through the event period.

entries.title: Renderer update: new styles, combos, help pages, and hub title support ✦
entries.summary: <grad #55FFFF #FFFFFF #AA55FF>The text renderer was expanded with new wrapper styles and better combo support, while hub feed titles can now use styled renderer text.</grad>
details: Added new wrapper styles including ChromaSplit, Afterimage, Scanline, Hologram, Posterize
Banded, Rune Reveal, and Rune alias support.
Improved combo behavior so newer wrappers work more cleanly with gradients, rainbow text, outline, shadow, glow, and other existing effects.
Expanded Hex Help with examples for the newer styles and added hub feed title support so entries can display styled titles directly in the GUI.
Nether portals can now be huge 64x64 max and 1x2 portal size(this means the portal itself not frame. So you would need at least 6 blocks.

Fixed Orb roller bug with perfect core. As well the socketing issue imprinting to overlay.

entries.title: &cMod Hot Fixes
details: This patch/upload was to fix the positioning of some text and get rid.
of some runoff text.

Plans for custom story are underway, will need to rework existing custom story so far.

entries.title: HexHub live feed online
entries.summary: Remote GitHub feed is now working.
details: This is the first live entry.
Future updates can be appended here.

entries.title: New Command: Rarity Evolve Test
entries.summary: You can now test evolved rarity styling directly from the rarity command.
details: Use /rarity evotest 1, /rarity evotest 2, or /rarity evotest 3 on the held item.
Aliases /rarity evo <tier> and /rarity evolved <tier> work the same way.
The test applies your evolved rarity color formatting and writes the evolved tier and boost lines for previewing.
<#ff007e>Commands work in a single player environment and not on server unless permissions have been granted.</#>

entries.title: Planned: Useless backport
entries.summary: Planned backport of selected older mod features and blocks.
details: This is a planned backport of selected content from older mods.
The focus is on blocks, items, utility features, and older mechanics rather than bringing biomes over.
This notice is meant as a roadmap-style preview of older content that may return in a cleaned-up 1.7.10-friendly form.

entries.title: Git Hub Live Readings
details: This was a live edit made about 9:22 PM, so it should show up and read from the GitHub.

entries.title: Server Update
details: Basically, some items in the auction would print as a pseudo black common but be pearlescent or something.
So that should be fixed persay, currently refreshing current story NPCs and planning custom story.

entries.title: New Feature: Tabbed News / Notes
entries.summary: The hub feed now supports local JSON and optional remote feed loading.
details: Edit config/hexcolorcodes/hub_feed.json to change these rows without rebuilding the mod.
If remoteUrl is set and reachable, the hub will try that feed first and fall back to the local entries.

entries.title: Maintenance: Hub shortcuts reorganized
entries.summary: Existing publish dates can stay fixed while new entries use TODAY.
details: Use a fixed date when you want a real publish date preserved on the row.
Use TODAY, LIVE, CURRENT, or a blank date field when you want the current day shown automatically.

entries.title: Activity: Join the Discord invite
entries.summary: Activities can still point at built-in actions like Discord.
details: This is a sample activity row using the built-in Discord action.
For a webhook-produced feed, point remoteUrl at a JSON endpoint rather than a Discord webhook URL directly.
